---
title: "Huy Duc Do"
image: media/headshot.jpg
about: 
  template: marquee
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
format:
  html:
    toc: true
  pdf:
    author: Huy Duc Do
    pdf-engine: weasyprint
css: style.css
format-links: [pdf]
bibliography: bibliography.bib
csl: vancouver-ama.csl
---

::: {.print-only .contact-block}
huydd1905@gmail.com |
huy.dd@vinuni.edu.vn |
huy.do1@umassmed.edu <br>
[My website](https://waltjer.github.io/mysite/) |
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/huy-do-a9681a156/) |
[GitHub](https://github.com/Waltjer) |
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9097-5212)
:::

::: {.no-print}
Hi there! Welcome to my personal website. I hope you’ll learn something new about me here, and maybe we can have a fun chat. I’m working hard to become a quantitative researcher in epidemiology and public health, which is a big goal of mine.

Outside of work, I’m a nerd, gamer, and pop culture enthusiast. I also enjoy technology and coding—like building this website! I love the thrill of solving problems and creating something from scratch. Once I start, I can’t stop! But deciding what to do and when to start? Well, that’s a whole other story—procrastination is a global phenomenon, after all. 😄
:::

# Education

## Primary education

**Biology** <br>
Hanoi University of Science, High School for Gifted Students [Sept 2011 --- June 2014]{.cvdate}

**Doctor of Preventive Medicine** <br>
Hanoi Medical University [Sept 2015 --- June 2021]{.cvdate}

**Master of Epidemiology** <br>
Hanoi Medical University [Sept 2021 --- June 2023]{.cvdate}

## Additional Education

### Coursera - EdX

#. **Systems thinking in public health** <br>
Johns Hopkins University

#. **Introduction to Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis** <br>
Johns Hopkins University

#. **Global Health: An Interdisciplinary Overview** <br>
University Of Geneva

#. **Learning How To Learn: Powerful mental tools to help you master tough subjects** <br>
McMaster University, University Of California San Diego

#. **Epidemiology: The Basic Science Of Public Health** <br>
The University Of North Carolina At Chapel Hill

#. **Introduction to Probability and Data with R** <br> Duke University

#. **AI For Everyone** <br> DeepLearningAI

#. **Machine Learning** <br> DeepLearningAI

#. **Google Data Analytics Specialization** <br> Google

#. **MicroMasters Program Statistics and Data Science** (Currently enrolled) <br> Massachusetts Institute of Technology

### Short-term training

#. **NIH Grant Writing Course** <br> Keith W. Kelley (Professor Emeritus of Immunophysiology, University of Illinois)

#. **Introduction to Modeling and Cost-Effectiveness** <br> Luong Nguyen Liem Binh (Associate Professor in Health Economic Université de Paris Cité)

# Experience{style="page-break-before: always"}

## Employment

#. **Intern** <br> Bio-risk Management Remote Engagement, Vietnam One Health University Network [*2018 --- 2020*]{.cvdate}

#. **Data Analyst** <br> Center for Training and Research on Substance Abuse HIV, Hanoi Medical University [*2022 --- 2024*]{.cvdate}

#. **Intern** <br> The George Washington Institute of Data Science and Artificial Intelligence (ISODS) [*June 2024 --- June 2025*]{.cvdate}

#. **Research Project Coordinator** <br> College of Health Sciences, Vin University [*May 2024 --- March 2026*]{.cvdate}

#. **Research Assistant** <br> College of Health Sciences, Vin University [*March 2026 --- Current*]{.cvdate}

## Research projects

#. **Complete DNA-microarray technical process to identify congenital hearing loss gene mutations** <br>
*Hanoi Medical University funded study* <br>
Data collection, data analysis

#. **Completing the technological process of producing a kit to determine the level of sperm DNA breakage to diagnose male infertility** <br>
*Vietnam Ministry of Health funded study* <br>
Data collection, data analysis

#. **Evaluating the actual effectiveness of the AstraZeneca vaccine and important factors in preventing SARS-CoV-2 infection in some at-risk communities in Vietnam** <br>
*Vietnam State funded study* <br>
Data collection, data analysis

#. **Research to build an artificial intelligence system to support prenatal screening for some common abnormalities in Vietnam** <br>
*Vietnam State funded study* <br>
Data collection, data analysis

#. **Screen, Treat and Retain Meth-using People With Opioid Use Disorders at Methadone Clinics (STAR-OM)** <br>
*US NIH funded study* <br>
Data collection, data analysis

#. **Apply AI models in predicting nutrition and physical activity level of Vietnamese youth** <br>
*Vietnam State funded study* <br>
Data collection, data analysis

#. **Prevalence of sexual orientation and gender identity change efforts and related psychosocial well-being in Vietnam** <br>
*UNFPA funded study* <br>
Data collection, data analysis

#. **Clinical, laboratory, and microbiological differences between early- and late-onset neonatal sepsis in preterm infants: a cross-sectional study in Vietnam** <br>
*Research study* <br>
Data analysis

#. **Rapid Reviews/Infectious Diseases** <br>
*Gates Foundation funded study (Ongoing)* <br>
Assistant editor

#. **Risk Factor for Chronic Disease In Asia: A Secondary Data Analysis Of Steps Survey In 25 Countries** <br>
*(Ongoing)* <br>
Data analysis

#. **Feasibility Study for the Vietnam Cohort Study (VINCohort)** <br>
*VinUni funded study* <br>
Coordinator

#. **Improving OSCE Score Accuracy with Borderline Regression - Insights from VinUniversity (Ongoing)** <br>
*VinUni funded study* <br>
Data analysis

#. **MOTOAIR-VN: Air Pollution Exposure and Health Impact among Scooter Delivery Drivers in Vietnam** <br>
*VinUni funded study* <br>
Data collection, data analysis

## Teaching and mentoring

#. **Thesis Advisor, Center for Training and Research on Substance Abuse—HIV** <br>
Hanoi Medical University [*2022 --- 2024*]{.cvdate}

#. **Teaching Assistant** <br> VinUniversity [*May 2024 --- Now*]{.cvdate}

#. **Self hosted coding class**

# Publication{style="page-break-before: always"}

::: {style="display:none"}
@Phung-etal-2023
@Cuong-etal-2023
@VuTo-DoDuc-NguyenThi-2023
@NguyenThi-etal-2023
@Trang-etal-2023
@Do-etal-2024
@Thanh-etal-2024
@Nam-etal-2024
@Diệp-etal-2024
@Hòe-etal-2024
@Huy-etal-2024
@Diep-etal-2025
@Nguyen-etal-2025
@MaiTrong-etal-2025
@Le-etal-2025
@Xuân-etal-2025
@Hương-etal-2025
@Nguyen-etal-2026
:::

::: {#refs}
:::

# Fellowship and awards{style="page-break-before: always"}

## Fellowship

D43 Fellowship on Training Program for Strengthening Research Capacity in Non-Communicable Diseases in Vietnam - University of Massachusetts Medical School and Hanoi Medical University | 2021-2023

## Award

#. 3rd prize - Hanoi Medical University student scientific conference 2017

#. 3rd prize - Hanoi Medical University student scientific conference in English 2017

#. 2nd prize - Ministry of Education and Training student scientific conference 2018

# Conferences{style="page-break-before: always"}

#. Phạm Quang Hải, Đỗ Đức Huy, Đặng Công Sơn. Desire to have children of people living with HIV/AIDS in Vietnam. Hanoi Medical University student scientific conference in 2017.

#. Vũ Tố Giang, Đỗ Đức Huy. Application of DNA Microarray technique to detect 16 mutations in 4 common genes in deaf children in Hanoi, Vietnam. Third Prize, Hanoi Medical University student scientific conference in 2017.

#. Vũ Tố Giang, Đỗ Đức Huy. Mutation detection for pediatric non-syndrome hearing loss by DNA microarray and Next-generation sequencing in Vietnam. Second Prize, The 4th Hanoi Medical University student scientific conference in English in 2018.

#. Vũ Tố Giang, Đỗ Đức Huy. Applying Microarray and NGS to study polymorphisms of 18 genes in non-syndromic deaf children. Second Prize, Ministry of Education and Training student scientific conference in 2018.

#. Đặng Thị Trang, Đỗ Đức Huy, Lê Thanh Hải. Training needs assessment on biorisk management among laboratories staff at human health and animal health sectors in Vietnam 2020. The 7th Hanoi Medical University student scientific conference in English in 2020.

#. Phung NH, Nguyen CT, Tran TK, et al. A Combination of Multi-Branch CNN and Feature Rearrangement for Down Syndrome Prediction. 2023 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Information and Communication (ICAIIC).

#. Huy DD, Duong TD, Jeffrey M, Pham TT, Christina LS. Improving OSCE Score Accuracy with Borderline Regression - Insights from VinUniversity. 2024 Vietnam Association for Medical Education conference.

#. Nguyen, V. T. T., Do, H. D., Zhan, J., Willett, W. C., & Bui, L. (2026, May 29–June 2). Associations of multiple dietary indices with health outcomes and diet-related greenhouse gas emissions in U.S. adults: Evidence from NHANES 2005–2018 [Conference presentation abstract]. ASCO 2026 Annual Meeting

#. Bui, L. T. K., Do, H., Pham, T. T., Hoang, L. B., Tran, M. T., Tran, C. T. D., Le, L. C., & Bui, L. P. (2026, May 14–17). Prevent cardiovascular risk: Model comparison in Vietnamese adult employees [Conference presentation abstract]. Asian Pacific Society of Cardiology Congress (APSC 2026), Taipei, Taiwan.

#. Hoang, T.-A., Nguyen, N. M.-L., Ngo, Q.-M., Do, D.-H., & Pham, T.-T. (2026, May 14–17). The cardiovascular burden of metabolic syndrome in Asia: Comparative estimates of prevalence and attributable risk [Conference presentation abstract]. Asian Pacific Society of Cardiology Congress (APSC 2026), Taipei, Taiwan.

# Social activities{style="page-break-before: always"}

## Clubs

#. Hanoi Medical University Volunteer club - member

#. Hanoi Medical University Rhetoric and Debate club - member

## Other activities

#. Y1+1: Y muỗi Go - Head of digital design and advertisement team | 2016

#. Vietnam Private Sector Economic Forum - Volunteer | 2019

#. TED - Volunteer translator | 2017 - now

#. YBOX - Volunteer translator | 2018 - 2019

#. Trái tim vì cộng đồng - Volunteer | 2024

# Skills{style="page-break-before: always"}

## Language

English: 7.0 IELTS

## Data analysis

Stata, R, Python

## Media

Photoshop, OBS studio
